titleStmt.title: SII 28.298: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 298. (A.R. No. 452 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple, central shrine, north base of the maṇḍapa in front.

p.hi: Achyuta-dēva-mahārāya Śaka 1454, Nandana, Kuṁbha, śu. 3, Monday, Uttiraṭṭādi. Irregular.
p.note: Probably the equivalent is 1533 A.D., January 27, Monday. On that day, it was śu. 2 upto ·42 and PUraṭṭAdi commenced after ·03.

summary.p: This inscription records the resolution of śēnai-mudali-āḻvār, and the śrītāṉattār, having authority on account of their management of the temple, of the temple of Kariya-perumāḷ, having met in the sōpāna-maṇḍapam infront of the (shrine of) the God, to grant kāṇi-āṭchi consisting of a house site, a loom, 50 kuḻi of land out of the tiru-viḍai-āṭṭam land of the God in Poṉparappi and one nāḷi of the food offered to God daily, to Kaṇṇaṉ and his brother and to the former's progeny, in view of the former having instituted a car festival (?). Kaṇṇaṉ was a kaikkōḷaṉ. This kāṇi-āṭchi was capable of being sold and mortgaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran hariya rāyara vibhāṭan bhāṣaikku tappuvarāya kaṇḍan kaṇḍanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭaṇṭa ṣeems to be written one below the other.nāṭu koṭātāṉ tululu ṣeems to be written below the line.kkataḷa vipāṭaṉ tulukkamomo written one below the line. kān taviḻttāṉ Emmaṇḍalamum tiṟai koṇṭaruḷiya Aścutadeva makārāyar piṟatuvi rācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 4 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa nantaṉa caṅvaṟsarattu kumpa nāyaṟṟu pūṟuva pa[kṣa*]t
tiṟutikaiyum comavāramum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nakṣatrattu nāḷ malāṭākiya ceṉanāta vaḷanāṭṭu makatai maṇṭalattu veṟu piṟinta Āṟṟūrkkūṟṟattu Āṟakaḻur kariya perumāḷ caṉṉatiyilk kukaiyūr kaiykkoḷa taṭiveṅki makaṉ kaṇṇaṉ teṟ(r) Eṭukkaiyil perumāḷ kariya perumāḷ caṉṉatiyil ceṉai mutali Āḻvaārum śrīkāriyam ceyvār koyil Atikāram śrītāṉattārum Āka copāṉamaṇṭapattil niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkuṭi Iruntu ceṉai mutali Āḻvār tiruvāy
ruḷinapaṭi Āka Inta kaṇṇaṉukku kāṇi Āṭci Āka paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi koyilukku teṟkku tātaṉ maṉaikku kiḻakku mutaliyāḷ maṉaikku meṟku Oru maṉaiyum Oru taṟi māṉipaḻakiyākaṇanal Ūrile periya piṭaāri Iṟaiilikku kiḻakku vāykkālukku vaṭakku teṟku kollai Oṉṟum poṉparappi tiruviḷaiāṭṭam nañcai nilattil poṉparappi tevatāṉattukku vaṭakku Ākkūr 3 � 5 10 koyil tiṉamāṉam nāḻippiṟacātamum Imaruvāti ceṉai mutali Āḻvār tiruvāyi malantaru
yāle Inta cuvantiram Uṇṭāṉa maruvātiyum Ivaṉ tampi ciṉṉaṉum Ivaṉ vaṟkattārum Aṉupavittu viṟṟum Oṟṟi vayttuk koḷḷak kaṭaivārākavum § malaimaṇpaṭa perumāḷ Eḻuttu kariya perumāḷ Eḻuttu veṉṟumālaiyiṭṭa perumāḷ Eḻuttu poreṟṟuppiḷḷai Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
